chunks.text: Cadence Software - UCB EECS License Cadence Software - UCB EECS License public page Cadence licenses are purchased by EECS instructional support (ISG) and are available for check-out within the UC Berkeley network from an EECS license server. E

Berkeley network from an EECS license server. Eligible EECS faculty, grad students, and staff may get license and support information here for their own computers (login with your Calnet credentials). Please see cadence.help for more informati

tials). Please see cadence.help for more information about Cadence tools on the EECS instructional computers. EECS Instructional Support Group (ISG) WEB: http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~inst email: inst@eecs.berkeley.edu Thu Mar 19 02:30:30 PDT 2026
